movies.overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
movies.title: The Odyssey

movies.original_title: คนเดือดทวงแค้น
movies.overview: Tormented by past mistakes and a terminal diagnosis, an ex-debt collector returns to the underworld to protect the victims of a violent organization.
movies.tagline: A Debt Can Be Settled, But Not Erased.
movies.title: The Debt Collector

movies.overview: Desperate to save a struggling country club and earn his father's respect, a washed-up tennis pro is compelled to break a sacred vow and do the unthinkable: play pickleball.
movies.title: The Dink

movies.overview: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces with him to prove there's life beyond our understanding.
movies.title: Disclosure Day

movies.overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.
movies.title: Masters of the Universe

movies.overview: After her mother's sudden death, Ruth returns to her hometown and reunites with her father, whose odd behavior makes her question what really happened.
movies.title: The Truthers

movies.overview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
movies.tagline: A brand new day starts now.
movies.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day

movies.overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.
movies.title: Scary Movie

movies.overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.
movies.tagline: If you're searching for new adventure, "this is the way."
movies.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu

movies.overview: When Haya's best friend Jawad gets engaged, her chronically-single world unravels — because who knew true love could be hiding in the friend zone?
movies.title: Love in Slow Motion

movies.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.
movies.tagline: Be careful who you wish for…
movies.title: Obsession

movies.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
movies.title: Backrooms

movies.overview: In this retelling of a real case, a former escort discovers her wealthy husband's infidelity and struggles to cope as betrayal poisons their marriage.
movies.title: Elize: Shadows of a Woman

movies.overview: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility. Trapped inside with no escape, Se-jeong along with a small group of survivors must fight to stay alive while the infected undergo horrific transformations.
movies.title: Colony

movies.overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.
movies.title: The Death of Robin Hood

movies.overview: Flashback to 1994, before Hong Kong’s handover to China. As the Special Branch of the Royal Hong Kong Police Force prepares to disband, the kidnapping of a powerful business tycoon ignites a dangerous covert power struggle within the force. Caught in the conflict are two officers: the passionate and righteous M.B. Lee and the cold-blooded and ambitious Peter Choi. Four formidable factions — the city’s wealthiest family, the Poon’s, the police, the triads, and the British authorities — are drawn into a deadly vortex of ambition, betrayal, and hidden agendas. As old alliances fracture and new ones form, Hong Kong stands on the brink of a seismic power reshuffle that will cast a long shadow into the future.

production_companies.name: Shanghai Ruyi Film & TV Production 上海儒意影视制作

movies.title: Cold War 1994

movies.overview: A string of threatening emails escalates into a revenge plot involving a newly married US marshal and his ex-girlfriend.
movies.title: A Toxic Love Story

movies.overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.
movies.title: Toy Story 5

movies.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.
movies.tagline: Surviving the crash is just the beginning.
movies.title: Deep Water

movies.overview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
movies.tagline: The ocean chose her for a reason.
movies.title: Moana

last_episode_to_air.name: Spoiler: Gary Dies
last_episode_to_air.overview: After breaking a quantum-interference device, mild-mannered comic book store owner Stuart Bloom must save the universe from imminent destruction.

tv_shows.name: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv_shows.original_name: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv_shows.overview: After accidentally creating a new multiverse, comic book store owner Stuart Bloom must locate a quantum-interference device to restore reality.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: After accidentally creating a new multiverse, comic book store owner Stuart Bloom must locate a quantum-interference device to restore reality.

tv_shows.tagline: Every universe needs a hero. We got Stuart.

last_episode_to_air.name: Valles Marineris
last_episode_to_air.overview: Pike leads the crew into a stellar storm, sending the Enterprise back 65 million years.

tv_shows.name: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
tv_shows.overview: Follow Captain Christopher Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S. Enterprise, as they explore new worlds around the galaxy.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: Special installments of the series.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: The series follows the voyages of the Starfleet starship USS Enterprise (NCC-1701), captained by Christopher Pike, during its second five-year mission (2259-2264), which precedes Captain James T. Kirk's five-year mission narrated in the television series Star Trek. The series picks up on stardate 1738.12 (2259), a couple of years after the events that occurred in the second season of the television series Star Trek: Discovery, when Pike temporarily captained the USS Discovery.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: In season two, the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise, under the command of Captain Christopher Pike, confronts increasingly dangerous stakes, explores uncharted territories and encounters new life and civilizations. The crew will also embark on personal journeys that will continue to test their resolve and redefine their destinies. Facing friends and enemies both new and familiar, their adventures will unfold in surprising ways never seen before.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: In season three, when we reconnect with the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise, still under the command of Captain Pike, they face the conclusion of season two's harrowing encounter with the Gorn. But new life and civilizations await, including a villain that will test our characters' grit and resolve. An exciting twist on classic Star Trek, season three takes characters both new and beloved to new heights, and dives into thrilling adventures of faith, duty, romance, comedy and mystery, with varying genres never before seen on any other Star Trek.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: In the fourth season, the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise—led by Captain Christopher Pike—embarks on a series of thrilling and emotional adventures across the stars. As they journey to strange new worlds, they battle inner demons and external threats, encounter colorful new characters, reunite with familiar faces and confront terrifying aliens. Through it all, they strive to embrace a bright, hopeful future.

tv_shows.tagline: Boldly go one step closer to where it all began.

last_episode_to_air.name: Love Is a Canyon
last_episode_to_air.overview: While the future of the Double K ranch hangs in the balance, Staten and Quinn ponder the meaning of home as love and loss sweep through the town.

tv_shows.name: Ransom Canyon
tv_shows.overview: Passions run deep in a small Texas town, as three ranching dynasties fight for their land, their legacies and the people they love.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: As news of a hostage situation reaches the squad, they race to launch a rescue mission and take down a skilled assassin who has nothing left to lose.

tv_shows.name: Elite Force
tv_shows.overview: After an unprecedented attack on his unit, a high-ranking officer set to leave the field leads a perilous mission that forces him to confront his past.

last_episode_to_air.name: Whatever You Do, Don't Go Home
last_episode_to_air.overview: The race to evade Camille leads Juliette to a shocking discovery. Daniel seeks help from a friend.

tv_shows.name: Silo

next_episode_to_air.name: Memory
next_episode_to_air.overview: The events following Juliette's return come to light—and unexpected allies are made.

tv_shows.overview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: In a bleak dystopian future, humanity clings to survival deep underground within the confines of a colossal silo. Juliette, an engineer tasked with unraveling the mystery behind the death of a colleague, uncovers startling secrets that threaten the very fabric of their enclosed world.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Stranded outside her silo with a failing suit, Juliette Nichols races against time, stunned to find another silo nearby that could be her only hope for survival. Meanwhile, unrest brews inside her original silo as Bernard Holland rallies citizens to maintain order amid rising questions about their world. As Juliette faces unexpected dangers near the new silo, hidden truths about the silos’ origins and the world beyond begin to surface, deepening the mystery.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Season three reveals an origin story set centuries earlier, while continuing the saga of a dystopian society of 10,000 people living underground under mysterious circumstances. In the present, Juliette Nichols survives her forced "cleaning" but returns with memory loss as the silo recovers from rebellion and faces a dangerous new threat. Meanwhile, in the "Before Times," journalist Helen Drew and Congressman Daniel Keene uncover a conspiracy that pulls them into a chain of events with catastrophic, irreversible consequences.

tv_shows.tagline: The key to the future lies in the past.

last_episode_to_air.name: Recluse
last_episode_to_air.overview: A new adversary appears, disrupting the balance and challenging the murthehelp team.

tv_shows.name: A Shop for Killers
tv_shows.overview: A niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall faces a new truth after her uncle's sudden death.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: After the sudden death of Jian's uncle, she learns of a suspicious shopping mall that he left behind. Who was her uncle, and what kind of shopping mall did he run? Before Jian can even fathom what is going on, she is attacked by unidentified people who are after her uncle's supplies.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Season 2 returns with Jian in control of the weapons shop, Jinman returned from the dead, and BABYLON well and truly on the backfoot. Working to keep Jian safe, Jinman will take the fight to BABYLON's door, but the mercenary organization won't go down easily. Humiliated, BABYLON will bring in help from overseas and unleash a new wave of deadly assassins to rebuild their ranks and exact their revenge.

tv_shows.tagline: His hidden past. Her deadly inheritance.

last_episode_to_air.name: Read the Room
last_episode_to_air.overview: Lucky tries to track down Cary—and her money. Agent Rand investigates Lucky's moves.

tv_shows.name: Lucky

next_episode_to_air.name: Too Close to See It
next_episode_to_air.overview: As Lucky confronts betrayal, old grudges take a back seat to a deadly chase.

tv_shows.overview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Scar
last_episode_to_air.overview: Anna drives to Cape Fear to find Crystal—and answers. Max gives lethal instructions to Nevaeh.

tv_shows.name: Cape Fear

next_episode_to_air.name: The Executioners
next_episode_to_air.overview: The Bowdens have everything to protect. Max has nothing left to lose.

tv_shows.overview: When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: Chaos engulfs the palace as the vengeful spirit moves to devour everything in its path. Can Gu-cheon and Saeng-gang stop him before it's too late?

tv_shows.name: The East Palace
tv_shows.overview: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Set during a fictionalized Joseon Dynasty, it follows Gu-cheon, an arrogant ghost-slayer who can walk between worlds, and Saeng-gang, a lowly court lady who hears the dead, as they team up to save the last royal heir.

tv_shows.tagline: Beyond boundaries, they unearth the truth.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: Manager Kim is captured and tortured — until the Special Missions Directorate steps in with a final mission. Ju Gang-chan makes a plan to get revenge.

tv_shows.name: Agent Kim Reactivated
tv_shows.overview: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

last_episode_to_air.name: Unbowed and Unbent
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the search for Aemond and Vhagar continues, Daemon attempts to control the spiraling situation in King's Landing.

tv_shows.name: House of the Dragon
tv_shows.overview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Set nearly 200 years before Game of Thrones, King Viserys I Targaryen names his daughter, Princess Rhaenyra, as heir to the Iron Throne, breaking tradition and igniting tensions within the realm.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: House Targaryen is divided in two. Civil war looms as both sides seek support from the great houses of Westeros, ultimately amassing armies — and dragons.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: The Black and Green factions lock into an all-out, relentless struggle for the Iron Throne. As dragons and armies clash across the realm, Westeros witnesses the devastating consequences of total war.

tv_shows.name: Soy Luna: Let's Roll Again
tv_shows.overview: After an accident that sidelined her, Luna returns to her beloved Jam & Roller. Putting on her skates again won't be easy, especially when a hidden villain's plan starts to complicate her life. She'll also face a dilemma, torn between old flames. Amidst songs, adventures, and reunions with friends, Luna will have to overcome many obstacles to fulfill her dream.

last_episode_to_air.name: Get the Key! Luffy vs. Scopper Gaban
last_episode_to_air.overview: Gaban challenges Luffy to try to take the key from him. Luffy goes for it, only to be overpowered by Gaban's sheer force. Meanwhile, Shamrock and Gunko summon reinforcements and plot a detailed strategy to disorient the Giants.

tv_shows.name: One Piece

next_episode_to_air.name: The Heinous Sinner - Loki of the Underworld Freed?!

tv_shows.overview:
Years ago, the fearsome Pirate King, Gol D. Roger was executed leaving a huge pile of treasure and the famous "One Piece" behind. Whoever claims the "One Piece" will be named the new King of the Pirates.

Monkey D. Luffy, a boy who consumed a "Devil Fruit," decides to follow in the footsteps of his idol, the pirate Shanks, and find the One Piece. It helps, of course, that his body has the properties of rubber and that he's surrounded by a bevy of skilled fighters and thieves to help him along the way.

Luffy will do anything to get the One Piece and become King of the Pirates!

seasons.name: East Blue
seasons.overview: Monkey D. Luffy meets the Red Hair Pirates as a young boy living in East Blue, swearing becoming the next Pirate King. 10 years later, Luffy sets sail and experiences first adventures, recruiting the first members of the Straw Hat Pirates.

seasons.name: Whiskey Peak & Little Garden
seasons.overview: The season follows Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates as they enter the Grand Line. After encountering the giant whale Laboon and his caretaker Crocus, they meet Princess Nefertari Vivi and become involved in the conflict against the criminal organization Baroque Works, led by the Warlord Sir Crocodile. Along the way, they also befriend the giants Dorry and Broggy on Little Garden.

seasons.name: Drum Island
seasons.overview:
Season 3 of One Piece, often called “Drum Island,” follows the Straw Hat Pirates as they search for a doctor after Nami becomes seriously ill.

The crew travels to Drum Island, a winter-covered kingdom ruled by the tyrannical Wapol. While trying to save Nami, Luffy and Sanji climb a dangerous mountain to reach the only doctor available, Dr. Kureha. There, they meet Tony Tony Chopper, a shy reindeer who gained human abilities after eating a Devil Fruit and serves as Kureha’s assistant.

After confronting Wapol and helping restore hope to the island, Chopper overcomes his past fears and joins the Straw Hat crew as their new doctor, marking an important emotional and strategic addition to the team.

seasons.name: Alabasta
seasons.overview: The Straw Hats, with Kureha's assistant Tony Tony Chopper, finally arrive at Arabasta, which is on the verge of civil war. Vivi must reach the rebels and tell them the real cause behind the conflict, but Crocodile, leader of Baroque Works and one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea, will not just stand by and watch. In the end, Baroque Works, marine forces, pirates, the royal guards, and the rebel army clash in a battle that will determine the fate of the country itself.

seasons.name: Dreams!, The Zenny Pirate Crew Sortie!, Beyond the Rainbow
seasons.overview:
Season 5 of One Piece is mostly made up of original filler stories, meaning they are not part of the main manga storyline but focus on side adventures of the Straw Hat crew.

The season begins with the “Dreams!” arc, where each Straw Hat reflects on their personal goals and motivations, highlighting their determination to continue their journey.

Next is the “Zenny Pirates” arc, in which the crew encounters an elderly moneylender named Zenny who lives on an island with his unusual group of companions. What starts as a conflict gradually turns into mutual respect as the Straw Hats learn about his past.

The final arc, “Rainbow Mist,” traps Luffy and his friends inside a mysterious, time-distorting fog. There they meet children who have been separated from their families for years due to the mist’s strange effects. The crew helps them uncover the truth behind the phenomenon and find a way back home.

seasons.name: Skypiea
seasons.overview: The Straw Hats arrive on the Sky Island Skypiea and learn of its connections to Jaya and Mont Blanc Noland's tale of a lost city of gold. As the crew embarks in search of treasure, they become entangled in a three-way war between the native Skypieans, the vengeful Shandians, and the land's cruel "god", Enel.

seasons.name: G-8 & Long Ring Long Land
seasons.overview:
Season 7 of One Piece, titled “G-8 & Long Ring Long Land,” follows the Straw Hat Pirates through dangerous confrontations and unusual competitions.

The season starts with the crew infiltrating a heavily guarded Marine fortress to recover treasure that was taken from them. Using teamwork and clever strategies, they manage to escape despite being surrounded by powerful naval forces.

Afterward, they encounter Foxy the Silver Fox and his crew, who challenge them to the Davy Back Fight, a series of pirate games where the losing team must give up crew members. The contests test the Straw Hats’ unity, skills, and loyalty as they struggle against Foxy’s tricky tactics.

Later, the crew meets Admiral Aokiji, a high-ranking Marine with overwhelming power. Although he defeats Luffy with ease, he ultimately lets the crew go, but his appearance signals that far stronger enemies await them in the future.

seasons.name: Water Seven
seasons.overview: The Straw Hats arrive at the oceanic metropolis of Water 7 to find a shipwright who can repair the Going Merry, as well as potentially join their crew. They soon become targeted by the Franky Family, the city's underground gang, and become involved in a plot within the Galley-La Company. Between the disappearance of Robin and a schism that develops between Luffy and Usopp, the crew begins to fall apart.

seasons.name: Enies Lobby
seasons.overview: The Straw Hats, Sogeking, the Franky Family, and the shipwrights of the Galley-La Company arrive at Enies Lobby aboard the Rocketman to rescue Nico Robin and Franky. Standing in their way, however, are the forces of the World Government, including its deadly assassination unit, CP9. A massive battle ensues between the two sides when Luffy declares war against the World Government.

seasons.name: Thriller Bark
seasons.overview: During their journey through the Florian Triangle, the Straw Hats arrive on a seemingly haunted island called Thriller Bark, where they encounter the Warlord Gecko Moria. Using his Devil Fruit abilities, Moria steals the Straw Hats' shadows. With the help of a mysterious talking skeleton named Brook, the crew must regain their shadows before sunrise in order to survive.

seasons.name: Sabaody Archipelago
seasons.overview: The Straw Hat Pirates arrive at the final island of the Grand Line's first half, Sabaody Archipelago. While searching for a means to pass under the Red Line into the New World, they come into conflict with a deadly slave trading ring that sells to the World Nobles. Luffy and Zoro are labelled as two of the Eleven Supernovas, rookies of significant bounties who have simultaneously arrived at the archipelago. A chain reaction of events engulfs the archipelago in chaos, and the Straw Hats are faced with their greatest challenge yet.

seasons.name: Amazon Lily
seasons.overview: After his defeat at the hands of Kuma at the Sabaody Archipelago, Luffy is sent flying and crash lands on Amazon Lily, an island exclusive to women that executes males on sight. As he tries to find a way off the island and back to his crew, Luffy makes unexpected friends and foes, while also learning of his brother's imminent peril.

seasons.name: Impel Down & Marineford
seasons.overview:
Luffy puts finding his crew on hold in favor of rescuing his brother Ace from the underwater prison Impel Down. With Boa Hancock's help, he manages to infiltrate the facility. However, fulfilling his objective and escaping the hellish prison might be easier said than done.

Having failed to reach Ace before he was transferred, Luffy and his companions escape from Impel Down and travel to Marineford, the base of Marine Headquarters. With the odds stacked high against him, the imminent threat of Whitebeard, and the ulterior motives of pirates that wish to overthrow the Emperor, Luffy struggles to hold his own in this titanic clash of powers.

seasons.name: Fishman Island
seasons.overview: The Straw Hat Pirates finally arrive at Fishman Island. There, the crew learn the history of Fisher Tiger and the ongoing discrimination between humans and fishman, while the New Fishman Pirates plot to overtake Ryugu Kingdom and make fishman be recognized as the supreme race.

seasons.name: Punk Hazard
seasons.overview: Upon finally entering the New World, the Straw Hat Pirates immediately receive a distress call from residents of Punk Hazard, who state that a samurai is attacking them. Without hesitation, Luffy sets out to the blazing island, with Vice Admiral Smoker hot on his tail. On the supposedly death-ridden and empty island, the Straw Hats soon must contend with both the G-5 Marines, led by Vice Admiral Smoker, and the mad scientist Caesar Clown, whose deadly experiments must be stopped.

seasons.name: Dressrosa
seasons.overview: The Straw Hat Pirates and Trafalgar Law, together with Kin'emon, Momonosuke and the captured Caesar Clown, travel to Dressrosa with the goal of taking down the nation's king, Warlord of the Sea Donquixote Doflamingo. However, they soon set into motion a series of world-changing events, as their actions interact unexpectedly with those of larger forces at play.

seasons.name: Dressrosa (2)
seasons.overview: A sequence of unexpected events shakes the world order, and Doflamingo proves to be a challenge that even some of the strongest warriors cannot overcome.

seasons.name: Zou
seasons.overview: After defeating Doflamingo, the Straw Hats, Trafalgar Law, Kin'emon, and Kanjuro arrive on Zou, in order to reunite with Sanji and the others. However, they discover that Sanji has been swept up in a set of personal and political entanglements and that Zou has been subjected to a siege by Jack of the Beasts Pirates.

seasons.name: Whole Cake Island
seasons.overview: Luffy, Nami, Chopper, Brook, and the minks Pekoms, Pedro, and Carrot head to Whole Cake Island, where Big Mom of the Four Emperors resides. Nicknamed the Sanji Retrieval Team, the group seeks to rescue their crewmate Sanji from his arranged marriage with Charlotte Pudding, set up to finalize a political alliance between the Charlotte Family and the Vinsmoke Family. However, during their operation, they become involved in a plot to assassinate Big Mom herself.

seasons.name: Levely Arc
seasons.overview: The Straw Hat Pirates' actions against the Big Mom Pirates are revealed to the world. Luffy's group is on its way to Wano Country while the Revolutionary Army prepares for their next move. Meanwhile, royalty across the globe gathers for the Reverie, without knowing that a shadow-like figure is pulling the strings of the World.

seasons.name: Wano Country Arc
seasons.overview: The Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance gather their forces in Wano Country and prepare for their inevitable clash against the Beasts Pirates. The history of Kozuki Oden and his ties to Wano Country, Whitebeard and Gol D. Roger are revealed, and the Alliance assaults Onigashima to take down the allied forces of Kaidou and Big Mom once and for all. The resulting battle, as well as the events during the recent Levely, cause the world to go through dramatic changes.

seasons.name: Egghead
seasons.overview: The aftermaths of both the Levely and the Raid on Onigashima, as well as the erasure of the Lulusia Kingdom, cause major shifts across the world that could lead to global war. The Straw Hat Pirates, following their Log Pose, arrive at the mysterious, futuristic island Egghead where the super genius Dr. Vegapunk resides. However, after being tipped off about Vegapunk's research into the Void Century, the World Government decides to dispatch a CP0 team to assassinate Vegapunk. Betrayal and intrigue on all sides leads to a Marine siege on the island that will escalate into an incident that will shock the world.

seasons.name: Elbaph
seasons.overview: After a daring escape from the Future Island Egghead, the Straw Hat Crew set their course for a legendary destination. Joined by the mighty Giant Warrior Pirates, they finally reach Elbaph, the long-awaited Land of Giants. New encounters with Giants, and long hoped-for reunions unfold. A colossal new chapter begins as the crew heads into an adventure unlike anything before, all in the pursuit of the ultimate treasure, the "One Piece!"

last_episode_to_air.name: Survival
last_episode_to_air.overview: In the final moments, what does it truly mean to survive?

tv_shows.name: Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston
tv_shows.original_name: Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston
tv_shows.overview: A historical exploration about the eruption of Vesuvius in 79 A.D. and the preserved Roman city it left behind.

last_episode_to_air.name: MY LAST WORDS
last_episode_to_air.overview: Haschwalt suddenly attacks Uryu to pass judgement. The ensuing explosion and smoke draw Ichigo to the scene where he and Uryu are reunited.

tv_shows.name: Bleach
tv_shows.overview: For as long as he can remember, Ichigo Kurosaki has been able to see ghosts. But when he meets Rukia, a Soul Reaper who battles evil spirits known as Hollows, he finds his life is changed forever. Now, with a newfound wealth of spiritual energy, Ichigo discovers his true calling: to protect the living and the dead from evil.

seasons.name: Thousand-Year Blood War
seasons.overview: The final arc of the Bleach series, where Ichigo Kurosaki and the Soul Reapers face off against the powerful Quincy army, led by Yhwach, in a battle that threatens the balance of all worlds.

last_episode_to_air.name: Cautionary Tale
last_episode_to_air.overview: Sugar wrestles with his fear of contamination. Vega forces Sugar to make an impossible choice.

tv_shows.name: Sugar

next_episode_to_air.name: What Else Can You Do?
next_episode_to_air.overview: With every other option spent, Sugar plays one last card. Charlotte opens up to Sugar.

tv_shows.overview: John Sugar is a dashing private eye navigating the dark corners of sunny LA. Though he sees only the good in humanity, Sugar is haunted by a secret too dangerous to expose.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Season two ushers in the return of Los Angeles' iconic private detective and film connoisseur, John Sugar, in a new case, tracking the troubled older brother of an up-and-coming local boxer, as his search for his beloved missing sister continues. As the investigation expands into a citywide conspiracy with sinister intentions, Sugar must reckon with himself to answer the question — how far will he go to do what's right?

last_episode_to_air.name: Salute Your Morts
last_episode_to_air.overview: Morty and Summer go to camp, broh. Beth and Jerry home alone, broh.

tv_shows.name: Rick and Morty
tv_shows.overview: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.

production_companies.name: Justin Roiland's Solo Vanity Card Productions

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Rick and Morty visit a pawn shop in space, encounter various alternate and virtual realities, and meet the devil at his antique shop.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: After Rick and Morty decided to unfreeze time, they must deal with alien parasites, alternate Jerrys and a decaying, possibly non-existent dimension.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Rick and Morty travel to Atlantis and take some time to relax, plus Rick turns himself into a pickle and faces off against the president.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: Everything and nothing makes sense when bizarre genius Rick and his grandson Morty take more interdimensional journeys that bend time and space.

seasons.name: Season 5
seasons.overview: Hold onto your butts — it’s season five, baby! Rick, Morty and the fam are back with ten all-new episodes that consume unheld butts. Sex, romance, testicle monsters… a guy named Mr. Nimbus… It’s everything you want, get your butt ready!

seasons.name: Season 6
seasons.overview: It’s season six and Rick and Morty are back! Pick up where we left them, worse for wear and down on their luck. Will they manage to bounce back for more adventures? Or will they get swept up in an ocean of piss! Who knows?! Piss! Family! Intrigue! A bunch of dinosaurs! More piss! Another can’t miss season of your favorite show.

seasons.name: Season 7
seasons.overview: Rick and Morty are back and sounding more like themselves than ever! It's season seven, and the possibilities are endless: what's up with Jerry? EVIL Summer?! And will they ever go back to the high school?! Maybe not! But let's find out! There's probably less piss than last season. "Rick and Morty," 100 years! Or at least until season 10!

seasons.name: Season 8
seasons.overview: Rick and Morty are back for Season Eight! Life has meaning again! Anything is possible! Look out for adventures with Summer, Jerry, Beth, and the other Beth. Maybe Butter Bot will get a new task? Whatever happens, you can't keep Rick and Morty down for long. People have tried!

seasons.name: Season 9
seasons.overview: Season 9 is all certified bangers. No AI slop! Just Grade A organic slop, made by real humans with real human traits like back hair and cysts. Please watch, or we'll have neglected our families for nothing.

tv_shows.name: Musafir Cafe

next_episode_to_air.name: Arrival
next_episode_to_air.overview: Sudha sweeps Chander off his feet, but they choose to stay friends. Now, he runs a hilltop café with Preeti by his side.

tv_shows.overview: Chander feels an undeniable connection with Sudha. Years later, he builds a new life in the hills with Preeti, but memories of the past linger.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Song of Deborah
last_episode_to_air.overview: Back in London, Judith and Debbie's friendship seems beyond repair. Queenie learns a shocking truth, Sam deals with the fallout of his actions, and the Director takes Judith back into the fold. As the final piece of Ana's plan falls into place, Debbie and Judith hurtle towards a spectacular season finale.

tv_shows.name: Ride or Die
tv_shows.overview: Best friends Debbie and Judith are forced on the run when Debbie discovers Judith isn't a forensic accountant, she's an international assassin! With a mysterious figure chasing them, and Debbie's husband involved in something deeply corrupt, it's a race against time and a road trip across Europe to untangle the truth and stay alive.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Limits of Forgiveness
last_episode_to_air.overview: A past debt comes due for Carlos Díaz. Emilio has a change of heart that could change Julieta's life, as one family finds hope and another falls apart.

tv_shows.name: My Daughter's Father
tv_shows.overview: Follows Julieta who, during her graduation party suffers a life-threatening health crisis that forces her mother, Maca, to face secrets from the past.
